creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I believe this issue is gone; net-snmp builds with IPv6 support enabled by default now (despite the existence of an IPV6 option).  I have a patch which will clean up the port Makefile accordingly: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D45030

Please re-open if I'm missing something.  I verified that print/hplip builds properly with my patch.
